## Execution Criteria

<!-- Scaffolded around the tool's test/ directory. One EVAL-Xxx per discovered test file. -->
<!-- A criterion MUST cite a real script — never invent test files. -->

- [ ] **EVAL-X01:** `<test-file-basename>` runs cleanly
  - **Test:** Invoke `<relative-path-to-test-file>` from the tool's directory; assert exit code 0
  - **Fail signal:** Non-zero exit code or stderr output indicating an assertion failure

- [ ] **EVAL-X02:** `<test-file-basename>` runs cleanly
  - **Test:** Invoke `<relative-path-to-test-file>` from the tool's directory; assert exit code 0
  - **Fail signal:** Non-zero exit code or stderr output indicating an assertion failure
